setup_task.sh lines 20-40 create hardcoded CSV with fixed dates from January 2024
setup_task.sh CSV data: donation dates range 2024-01-10 to 2024-01-21, expiration dates range 2024-01-20 to 2024-02-28
task.json success.spec.program field and verifier.py lines 165-384

privileged_info_summary: The community_fridge_safety task (v1.0) uses synthetic test data consisting of 18 hardcoded food items with donation and expiration dates from January-February 2024, generated by the setup script. The task requires 180 seconds timeout and 25 maximum steps. Verification checks for a calculated Days Until Expiration column with formulas, conditional formatting (red for ≤3 days, yellow for 4-7 days), ascending sort by expiration urgency, and row integrity. The task does not contain explicit metadata claims—only structural configuration fields.
